activities_projects.title: Detailed Theme Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To analyse the central theme in detail
steps: Read the lesson thoroughly
Identify the main theme and supporting ideas
Write the theme in 8–10 sentences with examples
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and relevance (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Richard Ebright
steps: Identify Richard Ebright’s qualities from the lesson
Write a character sketch in a short paragraph

activities_projects.title: Role of Mother in Ebright’s Success
activities_projects.objective: To analyse the influence of parental support
steps: List the ways Ebright’s mother supported him
Explain each point briefly

activities_projects.title: Cause–Effect Chart
steps: Identify four causes and effects from the lesson
Present them in a chart format

activities_projects.title: Scientific Curiosity Examples
activities_projects.objective: To identify examples of curiosity in the text
steps: Find incidents showing scientific curiosity
Explain any three incidents briefly

activities_projects.title: Summary with Key Achievements
activities_projects.objective: To summarise with focus on achievements
steps: List Ebright’s major achievements
Write a summary highlighting them

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary in Context
steps: Select five key words from the lesson
Explain their meanings in context

activities_projects.title: Life Skills Identified
activities_projects.objective: To identify life skills from the lesson
steps: List any four life skills shown by Ebright
Explain how each skill helped him

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Scientist Comparison
activities_projects.objective: To compare lesson with real life
steps: Choose a real-life scientist
Compare any two qualities with Richard Ebright

activities_projects.title: Paragraph on Failure and Success
steps: Identify a failure faced by Ebright
Explain how it led to success
